hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in 'git commit'|'git commit '*) b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); case "$b" in main|master) printf 'Refusing git commit on protected branch %s. Cut a feature branch first: git switch -c <name>\n' "$b" >&2; exit 2;; esac;; esac
